dataelements.item_template: [{"type":"potion","id":"healing#","number":null,"title":"Healing Potion","description":"You have found a Healing Potion and added it to your equipment!","message":"You can take this potion to regain 4d6 hit points.","no_of_dice":4,"die":"d6"},{"type":"potion","id":"mana#","number":null,"title":"Mana Potion","description":"You have found a Mana Potion and added it to your equipment!","message":"You can take this potion to regain 1d10 mana points.","no_of_dice":1,"die":"d10"},{"type":"potion","id":"adrenaline#","number":null,"title":"Adrenaline Potion","description":"You have found an Adrenaline Potion and added it to your equipment!","message":"You can take this potion to regain 1d10 adrenaline points.","no_of_dice":1,"die":"d10"},{"type":"potion","id":"stability#","number":null,"title":"Stability Potion","description":"You have found a Stability Potion and added it to your equipment!","message":"You can take this potion to decrease your insanity by 1d4 points.","no_of_dice":1,"die":"d4"}]
dataelements.trap_template: [{"type":"trap","id":0,"title":"Spike Trap","description":"You discover the trigger for a Spike Trap and, in your panic, accidentally activate it!","description2":"Do you try to disable the trap, or do you try to avoid the damage?","deactivate":true,"dodge_ability":"dex","deactivate_ability":"dex","dc":null,"effect_on":"hp","no_of_dice":4,"die":"d6","on_deactivate_title":"You attempt to deactivate the trap!","on_deactivate_message":"Please roll 1d20 plus your Dexterity modifier and enter the total value...","on_successful_deactivate":"You successfully deactivate the Spike Trap at the last moment and avoid all damage!","on_failed_deactivate":"You fail to deactivate the Spike Trap. Spikes burst out from all directions, striking you with full force!","on_avoid_title":"You attempt to dodge out of the danger zone!","on_avoid_message":"Please roll 1d20 plus your Dexterity saving throw and enter the total value...","on_successful_avoid":"Your reflexes are fast enough to escape the danger zone just in time, and you only take half damage from the spikes!","on_failed_avoid":"Your reflexes aren’t fast enough, and spikes erupt from the walls, piercing you!"},{"type":"trap","id":2,"title":"Poison Spray","description":"You step on a hidden pressure plate and hear a sharp hiss as something opens in the ceiling above you!","description2":"Do you try to disable the trap, or do you try to endure the effect?","deactivate":true,"dodge_ability":"con","deactivate_ability":"dex","dc":null,"effect_on":"adrenaline","no_of_dice":1,"die":"d6","on_deactivate_title":"You attempt to deactivate the trap!","on_deactivate_message":"Please roll 1d20 plus your Dexterity modifier and enter the total value...","on_successful_deactivate":"You successfully deactivate the Poison Spray just in time, avoiding any loss of adrenaline!","on_failed_deactivate":"You fail to deactivate the pressure plate as a cloud of greenish-gray poison bursts downward toward you!","on_avoid_title":"You brace yourself and trust your constitution!","on_avoid_message":"Please roll 1d20 plus your Constitution saving throw and enter the total value...","on_successful_avoid":"The poisonous cloud engulfs you, but your body resists most of its effects!","on_failed_avoid":"The poison seeps into your bloodstream, weakening your body and draining your adrenaline!"},{"type":"trap","id":3,"title":"Psychic Scream","description":"A sudden presence presses violently into your mind, filling your thoughts with alien whispers!","description2":null,"deactivate":false,"dodge_ability":"int","deactivate_ability":null,"dc":null,"effect_on":"insanity","no_of_dice":1,"die":"d4","on_deactivate_title":null,"on_deactivate_message":null,"on_successful_deactivate":null,"on_failed_deactivate":null,"on_avoid_title":"You attempt to push back against the invading presence!","on_avoid_message":"Please roll 1d20 plus your Intelligence saving throw and enter the total value...","on_successful_avoid":"You force the presence back, dulling the maddening whispers before they can fully take hold!","on_failed_avoid":"Your mind is overwhelmed by a psychic scream as the whispers tear through your thoughts!"},{"type":"trap","id":4,"title":"Ghostly Hands","description":"Ethereal, ghostly hands suddenly reach out from the walls toward you!","description2":null,"deactivate":false,"dodge_ability":"wis","deactivate_ability":null,"dc":null,"effect_on":"mana","no_of_dice":1,"die":"d6","on_deactivate_title":null,"on_deactivate_message":null,"on_successful_deactivate":null,"on_failed_deactivate":null,"on_avoid_title":"You attempt to fortify your mind against the spectral grasp!","on_avoid_message":"Please roll 1d20 plus your Wisdom saving throw and enter the total value...","on_successful_avoid":"You steel your will and resist the draining touch of the malevolent spirits!","on_failed_avoid":"The ghostly hands clutch at your soul, draining your mana in a chilling surge!"}]

manipulate.label: Reset Data Elements
manipulate.code: data.game_state = nil data.initiative_order = [] data.terrain_pieces = [] data.current_terrain = nil data.round = 0 data.number_of_players = 0 data.checking_players = true data.player_data = [] data.player_movement = nil data.current_player = 1 data.continue_game = true data.configuration = nil data.title = nil data.message = nil data.max_roll = nil data.traps = nil

manipulate.label: Set Game Start State
manipulate.code:
# Rotation helpers def rotate_matrix(matrix, degrees) case degrees when 0 matrix when 90 matrix.transpose.map(&:reverse) when 180 matrix.map(&:reverse).reverse when 270 matrix.transpose.reverse end end
def rotate_walls(horizontal, vertical, degrees) case degrees when 0 [horizontal, vertical] when 90 [vertical.map(&:reverse), horizontal.reverse] when 180 [horizontal.reverse.map(&:reverse), vertical.reverse.map(&:reverse)] when 270 [vertical.reverse, horizontal.map(&:reverse)] end end
# Parse terrain_template if needed terrains = data.terrain_template terrains = JSON.parse(terrains) if terrains.is_a?(String)
# Get terrain piece and deep-copy it tile_data = terrains.find { |t| t["id"] == "E" } tile = JSON.parse(JSON.generate(tile_data))
# Random rotation and starting placement tile["placement"] = 22 tile["rotation"] = [0,90,180,270].sample
# Rotate cells and walls rotated_cells = rotate_matrix(tile["cells"], tile["rotation"]) rotated_horizontal_walls, rotated_vertical_walls = rotate_walls(tile["horizontal_walls"], tile["vertical_walls"], tile["rotation"])
# Update current_terrain data.current_terrain = { "id" => tile["id"], "home" => tile["home"], "rotation" => tile["rotation"], "placement" => tile["placement"], "horizontal_walls" => rotated_horizontal_walls, "vertical_walls" => rotated_vertical_walls }
# Add to used terrain list data.terrain_pieces ||= [] data.terrain_pieces << data.current_terrain
# Apply to grid grid = JSON.parse(JSON.generate(data.grid_template)) start_row = 5 start_col = 5
(0..3).each do |r| (0..3).each do |c| global_pos = [start_row + r, start_col + c] rotated_cell = rotated_cells[r][c] rotated_cell["global"] = global_pos grid_row = global_pos[0] - 1 grid_col = global_pos[1] - 1 grid[grid_row][grid_col]["terrainID"] = tile["id"] grid[grid_row][grid_col]["effect"] = rotated_cell["effect"] grid[grid_row][grid_col]["occupied"] = nil grid[grid_row][grid_col]["exit"] = rotated_cell["exit"] end end
# Save to game_state data.game_state = grid

code.finalize: data.number_of_players = result["number_of_players"] data.configuration = result["configuration"] data.traps = result["traps"] data.checking_players = true

init.title: Player #, choose your character!
init.message: Place your mini on your chosen character's start position!

manipulate.label: Assign Position on Grid
manipulate.code:
# --- Helper --- def find_cell(game_state, r, c) game_state.flatten.find do |cell| g = cell["global"] g && g[0].to_i == r.to_i && g[1].to_i == c.to_i end end
# --- Find Cell --- r, c = data.player_movement cell = find_cell(data.game_state, r, c) effect = cell["effect"]
# --- Find Character Template based on Start Effect --- char_id = effect.to_s.sub(/S\z/, "").downcase chosen_template = data.character_template.find { |t| t["id"].to_s.downcase == char_id }
# --- Copy Found Template and Push into player_data --- chosen = JSON.parse(JSON.generate(chosen_template)) chosen["position"] = [r, c] data.player_data << chosen
# --- Update Cell in game_state as Occupied --- cell["occupied"] = (chosen["id"]).to_s

manipulate.label: Advance to Next Player
manipulate.code: data.checking_players = true data.current_player = data.current_player.to_i + 1 data.player_movement = nil

code.finalize:
data.player_data[data.current_player.to_i]["initiative"] = result["result"]
data.current_player = data.current_player + 1 data.max_roll = nil
if data.current_player.to_i < data.number_of_players.to_i data.checking_players = true else data.checking_players = false end

manipulate.label: Order Initiative
manipulate.code:
begin data.player_data.sort_by! { |p| -p["initiative"].to_i } rescue => e end
data.initiative_order = data.player_data

manipulate.label: Determine Next Turn & Reset Variables
manipulate.code:
# Reset Variables data.current_player = nil data.current_terrain = nil
# Determine Next Player if data.round >= data.initiative_order.length data.round = 0 data.current_player = data.initiative_order[data.round] data.round = data.round + 1 else data.current_player = data.initiative_order[data.round] data.round = data.round + 1 end

code.finalize: data.current_player = result["current_player"] data.game_state = result["game_state"] data.terrain_pieces = result["terrain_pieces"] data.player_data = result["player_data"] data.initiative_order = result["initiative_order"] data.configuration = result["configuration"] data.round = result["round"]

data.current_player = result["current_player"] data.initiative_order = result["initiative_order"] data.configuration = result["configuration"] data.player_data = result["player_data"] data.round = result["round"] data.game_state = result["game_state"]
data.game_state = result["game_state"] data.initiative_order = result["initiative_order"] data.round = result["round"] data.configuration = result["configuration"]

manipulate.label: Determine Game End Conditions
Rule: Game Ends If All Players Are Slain
manipulate.code: data.title = "All players were slain and have been claimed by the Dungeon of Doom!" data.message = "Better luck next time..."

manipulate.label: Rule: Game Ends If All Living Players Reach Their Exits
manipulate.code: data.title = "All players reached the exit and escaped the Dungeon of Doom!" data.message = "Congratulations to the survivors..."
